title: 【戴上她的光环】Wear her halo
description:
让你戴上学生的光环
Make you wear the aura of a student
body:
# 该材质包基于游戏《蔚蓝档案》开发。
# 安装后，sensei们可在游戏里“戴上”学生的光环。

**This resouse pack is based on the game <Blue Archive>.**

**After installation, you can "wear" the student halo in the game.**

**具体的操作方法是：**

**将【不死图腾】重命名为指定学生的名字后，物品会化作其光环，玩家手持便可“戴上她的光环”。**

**如：重命名为【Arona】时会变为阿罗娜的光环。**

**The specific operation method is:**

**After renaming the 【Totem of undying】to the name of the specified student, the item turns into its halo, which can be worn by the player while holding it.**

**For example, when renamed to [Arona], it becomes the halo of Arona.**

**【非常重要】需要安装optifine**

**【Very important】optifine needs to be installed**
